proposal1.heroHeadline: is spending thousands on proposals that could write themselves. Here is the math.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Your team writes proposals manually. This system generates them in under 60 seconds. Fully branded. Fully personalized. With an AI closer built in.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Six patterns bleeding time and revenue from  right now.

problems.title: Manual Proposal Writing
problems.description: Each proposal takes 3 to 5 hours of senior strategist time. That is time billed at zero. Every hour spent writing proposals is an hour  cannot spend on work that generates revenue.

problems.title: Slow Response Times
problems.description: Agencies that respond within 24 hours close at 3x the rate. Every day a prospect waits for your proposal, they are talking to your competitors. Speed is the differentiator most agencies ignore.

problems.title: Inconsistent Quality
problems.description: Tuesday proposals look different from Friday proposals. No standardized format, no consistent tone, no quality floor. The client experience changes depending on who writes it and how busy they are.

problems.title: Zero Follow-Up Intelligence
problems.description: Once a proposal is sent, you have no idea what happens. No tracking. No data on which sections they read. No chatbot to handle objections while the prospect is still engaged.

problems.title: Lost Billable Hours
problems.description: At 48 hours per month spent on proposals, that is 6 full working days your strategists are not billing clients. At $75 an hour, $3,600 in lost billable time. Every single month.

problems.title: Widening Competitive Gap
problems.description: Your competitors are already exploring automation. The agencies that figure this out first will respond faster, look sharper, and close more. The longer you wait, the wider that gap becomes.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Five integrated workstreams to replace manual proposal writing entirely.

solutions.title: Website Scraping Engine
solutions.description: Your team manually researches each prospect before writing a single word. The system reads their homepage, about page, services, and portfolio in 3 seconds. Every detail extracted automatically.

solutions.title: Brand Analysis
solutions.description: Your team guesses at how to match a prospect's tone and positioning. The system extracts exact brand attributes, colors, fonts, voice, and competitive positioning in 5 seconds flat.

solutions.title: AI Proposal Generation
solutions.description: A senior strategist takes half a day to write one proposal. This system writes a complete, client-ready proposal in your tone, with your services and pricing structure, in 30 seconds. From scratch. Every time.

solutions.title: AI Sales Chatbot
solutions.description: After your proposal is sent, questions go unanswered until someone checks email. The system embeds an AI sales assistant in every proposal that handles objections, answers questions, and books calls the moment the prospect is engaged.

solutions.title: Tracking and Analytics
solutions.description: Right now, you send a proposal and hope for the best. The system tells you exactly who viewed it, for how long, which sections they read, and alerts you on Telegram the second a prospect engages.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

proposal2.tag: Proposal for Cascade Health Systems // Confidential
proposal2.heroHeadline: Unlock a 3.5x Increase in Patient Engagement Using Data-Driven Strategies.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our strategic approach will elevate Cascade Health Systems' patient engagement by 3.5x within 6 months, increasing patient retention and satisfaction.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Cascade Health Systems is facing significant financial losses due to inefficiencies and missed opportunities.

problems.title: High Patient Churn
problems.description: With a churn rate of 20%, Cascade Health Systems is losing approximately $1.2 million annually in potential revenue from dissatisfied patients.

problems.title: Inefficient Lead Conversion
problems.description: Current lead conversion sits at 3%, resulting in $300,000 in lost revenue annually due to unoptimized patient acquisition processes.

problems.title: Underperforming Website
problems.description: An average bounce rate of 60% is causing $200,000 in wasted marketing spend each year, as potential patients leave without engaging.

problems.title: Poor Digital Engagement
problems.description: Low digital engagement levels are costing Cascade Health Systems 15% in potential growth opportunities, equivalent to $450,000 in revenue.

problems.title: Ineffective Content Strategy
problems.description: A lack of targeted content is leading to a 25% decrease in patient inquiries, resulting in $150,000 in lost opportunities annually.

problems.title: Suboptimal Brand Visibility
problems.description: Without a strong brand presence, $500,000 in potential market share is being lost to competitors annually.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions directly address these quantified losses, converting challenges into growth opportunities.

solutions.title: Comprehensive Patient Engagement Strategy
solutions.description: We will reduce patient churn by implementing a data-driven engagement strategy. Deliverables include a 12-month roadmap and regular performance analysis, aiming for a 20% improvement in retention.

solutions.title: Optimized Lead Conversion Framework
solutions.description: To address lead conversion inefficiencies, we'll deploy a conversion optimization framework including A/B testing and CRM integration, targeting a 5% conversion rate increase.

solutions.title: Website Revamp & SEO Enhancement
solutions.description: We will overhaul the website to reduce bounce rate by 15%, focusing on user experience improvements and SEO enhancements, resulting in higher patient engagement.

solutions.title: Targeted Content Marketing Initiative
solutions.description: Our content marketing initiative will increase patient inquiries by 25% through personalized content and strategic distribution across digital channels.

lead.company_description:
We are hard-wired to drive predictable revenue for our clients by unlocking, automating, and augmenting their funnels, pipeline, and operations for a de-costed, de-risked path to maximum profitability at scale.
 
With over a decade of experience helping hundreds of businesses from start-ups to enterprises, spanning 4 continents and 20+ countries we know what it takes to unlock our client's growth potential. We know exactly what it takes to open doors for our clients by getting them in front of the right decision-makers, with the right message at the right time!


Our talent and team augmentation solutions are geared perfectly to complement the revenue growth that we unlock and bestow on our clients, ensuring a more seamless, profitable path as they scale. Augmentix by Team Rocket unlocks our clients and their internal teams from repetitive operational tasks, circumnavigating bottlenecks and overloads by plugging flexible, remote, global talent, experts in their fields.
